task_title: Customer says they were charged three times

scores.justification: Agent retrieved all 120 orders and systematically searched for duplicate patterns by examining user_id, total_cents, product_ids, and timestamps across the dataset.

Agent identified o067, o068, o069 as the triple-submit cluster for user u008 with identical amount (4999 USD), same products (p007, p012), and timestamps 1 second apart (08:12:15, 08:12:16, 08:12:17).
Agent did not provide any recommendation about which order to keep or which to refund; the transcript ends without proposing a resolution strategy following the keep-lowest/refund-others convention.
Agent used `--limit 120` to retrieve all orders beyond the default 10-record limit, demonstrating awareness of pagination and retrieving the complete dataset.
